name: chain_vibecoded_services_300800build_mic
method: vibe-coded services: $300-800/build. micro-saas $5-15/mo. tools + maintenance = recurring. vibe coding services: custom builds $300-800. micro-saas $5-15/mo (10-20 users). internal tools $300-1k + $50

stages.task: Scrape Upwork/Reddit/Twitter for vibe-code build requests matching our stack (Next.js, Python, PWA, Capacitor)
Score leads by budget fit ($300-800), stack match, timeline, upsell potential (maintenance retainer)
Generate scoped proposal with timeline, deliverables, and price using claude -p from request description
Submit proposals on platform or send cold DM with portfolio links
